info.title: Ntersol.Scaffold
info.description:
Copyright (c) 2018-2022 NTERSOL
-o, --output            (Default: .\Output) change where output files are
written
--disable-database      (Default: false) disable generation of database
entities
--disable-common        (Default: false) disable generation of common entities
--disable-dataaccess    (Default: false) disable generation of data access
entities
--disable-logic         (Default: false) disable generation of business logic
entities
--disable-webapi        (Default: false) disable generation of web api
entities
--webapi-client         (Default: false) generate C# client for web api
--web                   (Default: false) generate clients for web
--mobile-android        (Default: false) generate clients for Android mobile
platform (Java)
--mobile-ios            (Default: false) generate clients for iOS mobile
platform (Swift)
-q, --quiet             (Default: false) suppress all output
-v, --verbose           (Default: false) output scaffolding info
--help                  Display this help screen.
--version               Display version information.
value pos. 0            Required. json schema file
